feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Mechanical response of a simple DNA nanostar hydrogel: symptoms of disorder and glassy emergence of solidity
entry.content:
Authors: H Ajiyel, AJ Genot, SH Kim, N Schabanel, H Guillou... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: ... In order to monitor systematically the emergence of solidity in these samples, we repeat the ... We confirm the emergence of elasticity at pSE well below 1/2 for all cases, except Y16SE8 ... is not the important physical ingredient behind the ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Level 2.5 large deviations and uncertainty relations for self-interacting jump processes: tilting constructions and the emergence of time-scale separation
entry.content:
Authors: F Coghi, JP Garrahan -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.19411, 2026

Abstract: Self-interacting jump processes (SIJPs) describe systems with non-Markovian stochastic dynamics in which transition rates depend on empirical observables of the process, which gives rise to long-range memory and feedback. We derive the ``level-2.5'' ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of unique hues from sparse coding of color in natural scenes
entry.content:
Authors: A Belsten, EP Frady, BA Olshausen -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.24293, 2026

Abstract: Our subjective experience of color is typically described by abstract properties such as hue, saturation, and brightness that do not directly correspond to sensory signals arising from cones in the retina. Along the hue dimension, certain colors -- red, green ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of Fragility in LLM-based Social Networks: the Case of Moltbook
entry.content:
Authors: L Sodano, S Sciangula, A Galmarini, F Bertolotti -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.23279, 2026

Abstract: The rapid diffusion of large language models and the growth in their capability has enabled the emergence of online environments populated by autonomous AI agents that interact through natural language. These platforms provide a novel empirical ...
